elements.text:
You are at a quiet restaurant with a lot of your family members for dinner. While taking a drink of your water, you accidently drop the glass on the floor and it shatters.

Here are some feelings that might happen in the moment:

texts: I'm confident that the waitress will accept my apology.
I feel like I ruined the evening, but everyone will forget about the broken glass.
I feel guilty about having broken a glass, but know that I didn't do it on purpose.
I'm embarrassed that I drew attention to myself.
I'm happy to be eating with my family.
